subject: status
body: wall and wall2 textures replaced with SVG brick/panel pattern placeholders. Also swapped girder/pipeH/ladder PNGs to SVGs. Zone tinting (line 1129) applies colors over the grayscale SVGs automatically. Remaining base64 PNGs are character art, UI elements, props, and weapons — not tileset. Want me to continue with more SVG replacements or shift focus?
